rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Banned words — grep zero-tolerance.
Ritual / practice (noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no "fixed" retrospectives, no session biography.
Register match.
Rough-cut drafts for articles.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Article-drafting register rule; target is a polished student-facing lecture, not an article rough cut.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Credit original when paraphrasing named technique.
Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body.
Over-hedge detector.
Verbatim-frame-cite in reference artefact.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Reference-artefact capture-discipline rule; target is a lecture, not a reference artefact capturing a user-supplied frame.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cap practitioner attribution at one student-side mention per module.
Punchy framing keeps punch; carve-out lives downstream.
Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project strategy docs, NOT student-facing curriculum body.
Watch out for planting jargon too early.
Audit closer when trimming body-prose forcing function.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Post-trim dangling-reference rule for exercise forcing functions; target is a lecture with no fenced prompt and no trimmed forcing function.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Past tense for exercise recap sections — heading and body.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No exercise recap section in this lecture; arc-narration tenses (past for prior modules, present for the now-move) are correct for the surface.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No combative verbs about the agent in body prose.
Aspirational destination, never corrective gap.
Earn every technical term on first use.
Business-audience word ban (Agents 101 default).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Agents 101 business-audience default; target is an AE101 software-engineer lecture where earned tech terms (skill, verifier, spec) are in-register.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Memory vs context — use deliberately.
Golden path only in body.
Trust Claude's defaults for structure.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Prompt-construction rule (ask + destination + show-me); target is a read-aloud lecture with no prompt.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Q1/Q2/Q3 retro interview is banned at every module. Compound-shape varies per module — never repeat same Debrief.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Debrief/compound-move shape rule; target is a stakes-setter lecture, not a Debrief.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Don't smuggle another module's voice.
Don't ask student to manually diff or spot-check Claude's output as error-catching.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No student error-catching ask in this lecture; the closing question is rhetorical, not a manual-diff instruction.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Simulation personas never alone.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Self-study simulation rule; target is an in-room lecture with no simulation persona.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No "What research says" callout boxes
Student moves stay in conversation with agent.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Forcing-function-channel rule for exercises; target is a lecture with no student forcing function.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Specify which CLAUDE.md layer — every time.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: No CLAUDE.md reference in the body; rule has nothing to bind to on this surface.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No em-dashes. Simple sentences.
Section headers use command verbs when section is about doing something.
Inline links use target's title, never filename.
Disambiguate shared-word collisions with Claude Code primitives on first student-authored use.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: First-student-authored-write disambiguation rule; target is a lecture with no authored write of a contested term (skill/verifier already earned operationally in M3/M5).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: LLM-vs-agent-vs-Claude vocabulary discipline.
No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
Reflection beats stay invisible in flow.
No meta-ask when student has already decided.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Meta-ask-in-prompt rule; target lecture has no prompt and no student-decision-then-ask loop.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: `.md` is default file type for student artifacts across curriculum.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: File-type default rule for save prompts; target lecture saves no artifact.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Cut NVA: true but not moving student forward.
Body "read it" / "look at it" / "notice X" after chat-print = dead weight.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Post-chat-print narration rule; lecture has no chat-print artifact for the body to point at.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Forward-callout closer: student as grammatical subject.
Operational reminders live at moment of use, not only where introduced.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Per-module operational-setting reminder rule; target is a lecture, not a module file gating a session with thinking-effort/model settings.
